text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"4","subject":"Create load testing harness","description":"Create tests/load/routing-simulation.test.js - Vitest-based load simulation exercising the full router stack with mock providers.

Scenarios:
- Happy path: 50 sequential requests, verify cheapest-first routing, free tier consumed first
- Rate limit exhaustion: Slam one model past RPM limit, verify automatic fallback to next cheapest
- Provider failure injection: Mock adapter throws errors, verify circuit breaker opens, requests reroute
- Timeout simulation: Mock adapter delays 10s, verify timeout and fallback
- Mixed load: Concurrent requests with tools/vision requirements, verify capability filtering
- Budget enforcement: Set $0.01 budget, verify hard stop
- Provider quality tracking: Track error rates per provider, verify provider_stats table populated

Implementation:
- Create mock provider adapters with configurable failure/latency/success behavior
- Use tests/helpers/testDb.js for in-memory SQLite
- Use Fastify .inject() (pattern from tests/unit/router/app.test.js)
- Seed 5+ providers with different pricing, free tiers, rate limits
- Assert on: route selection order, fallback count, circuit breaker state, usage records, provider_stats

Key files: tests/helpers/testDb.js, src/router/rate-limiter.js, src/router/scorer.js, src/providers/health-monitor.js, src/router/app.js","assignedBy":"test-dev","timestamp":"2026-03-09T02:40:28.585Z"}
